one_time_description: First Nations Gaming Revenue Share of $740,648 received in 2020 (no comparable amount in 2019)
economic_notes: Band is part of Okanagan Nation comprising seven Indian Bands. Located at head of Okanagan Lake in Vernon, BC. COVID-19 pandemic declared March 11, 2020 with unknown future impact. Band owns aggregates operation (Eagle Rock Aggregates). Cumulative royalty payments of $793,430 from aggregate sales owed to Ottawa Trust not yet transferred.
notes: Audit is qualified due to inability to verify carrying value of tangible capital assets acquired prior to 2010 (cost and acquisition dates not determinable). Four GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: OKIB Forestry LP, OKIB Management Services LP, Okanagan Indian Band Land Holding Company Ltd., Okanagan Band Development Corporation. One fully consolidated subsidiary: 631640 B.C. Ltd. Funds held in Ottawa Trust of $4,533,608 represent monies under Section 62 of Indian Act held in Consolidated Revenue Fund of Canada. ISC Native Claims Loan of $332,659 matured March 31, 2018 with no new maturity date agreed. General revenue includes $740,648 First Nations Gaming Revenue Share with no prior year comparable. total_government_transfers calculated as federal ($12,866,184) plus provincial ($1,251,268). OSR includes general revenue, rent, contract revenue, forestry CRSA, income from entities, and interest.
